_doc: M20 exit-refinement coverage matrix — one row per strategy leg. THE milestone's done-condition: every live leg carries a verdict per lever column (shipped / honest_negative / pending / blocked:<reason>). Update in the SAME PR as any verdict-producing work (binding per .claude/skills/exit-refinement). Statuses only from verified evidence (memo/sprint-log/PR refs) — never inferred.

legend.honest_negative: tested, failed the gate — hard levers/trail stand

exit_head_ml.ref: E3 LIVE 2026-07-12 (#6211 merged, operator-approved; artifact promoted shadow->advisory #6217; deploy #6216). below_half_r@tau0.10; first head-driven exit = mandatory health-review check.

trail_decay.ref: all 4 decay cells is_oos_fail (BTC 1h). P4.1 fleet decay sweep (2026-07-12, m20_fleet_exit_sweep --levers trail_decay, trainer relay #6253; runtime_logs/m20_fleet_decay/2026-07-12). Cells: arm2R / stall6 / stall10 / arm1.5R+stall6, tight = max(1.5, base_trail/2). Gate: config-exact IS+OOS beat on net_R AND maxDD + yearly walk-forward >= 4/6. || P4.4 UPDATE: passed_unshipped — p80 arm 6.49R tight2.5 PASS wf 4/6 (IS 51.8→55.4 net_R dd 21.8→21.0; OOS −24.5→−20.8 dd 31.9→30.6 — improves both axes though the leg is OOS-negative either way). Tier-3 declare proposed (batch 2). P4.4 p80 winner-MFE sweep (2026-07-13, m20_fleet_exit_sweep --p80-only, relay #6271/#6272; runtime_logs/m20_fleet_p80/2026-07-13). Arm = P80 of the leg's own IS-window winner-MFE; tight = base/2; same IS/OOS + wf gate.

regime_flip_exit.ref: HONEST NEGATIVE fleet-wide: wherever the flip actually fires (pullback chop-OFF, 72-89% of trades) it guts the trend tail — eth_pullback_2h +67.7R->-11.8R, tlt_pullback_1h +77.1->-26.6, gld_pullback_1h +115.5->+29.0; wf 0-2/6 typical. The 'PASS' rows are degenerate ties (long-only donchian legs where no 1-D cell is ever OFF for longs -> flip never fires -> flip==actual) or improvements on money-LOSING shadow legs (eth_prop -85.8->-66.4). The frozen ADX label reads 'chop' constantly inside live trends; the peak-is-in head (AUC~0.71, in shadow) addresses the same question far better. Frozen-label variant CLOSED; an ML-label variant would need per-symbol advisory heads (BTC-only today) and is not queued. P4.5 frozen-label regime-flip replay (2026-07-13, m20_flip_replay_sweep, trainer relay #6276; runtime_logs/m20_flip_replay/2026-07-13). Exit at the first bar whose ADX-14 label maps to an OFF policy cell for (family, direction).

exit_head_ml.ref: E1 pullback-2h AUC~0.50, memo §8 || PEAK-RETARGET UPDATE (2026-07-13, zero-regret M20 tail, relay #6280 run + #6305 readout; runtime_logs/m20_exit_head/peak_2h/pullback): peak_is_in retarget lifted AUC to 0.65-0.71 (live 0.77) but STILL honest_negative at the E1 gate — 0/5 folds — every cell loses the tail (2023 actual +131R vs best model +69R). Confirms the M20 pattern: the peak head only pays where actual exits are bad (BTC 1h donchian); healthy legs lose the trend tail.

exit_head_ml.ref: exit-head round 2 (2026-07-12, m20_exit_head_round.py, trainer relays #6236/#6238-#6240; 953 harness trades, 5 folds): E1 GATE FAIL — AUC mean ~0.55 (2023/2024 folds <0.50); best conditional shape below_half_r@tau0.15 beats actual 4/5 folds on both axes but gives back the 2023 trend year (+67.8R actual vs +3.0R; the plain stale-8 hard rule gets +37.2R there). Honest negative — no E2 || PEAK-RETARGET UPDATE (2026-07-13, zero-regret M20 tail, relay #6280 run + #6305 readout; runtime_logs/m20_exit_head/peak_4h/donchian): peak_is_in retarget lifted AUC to 0.65-0.76 but STILL honest_negative at the E1 gate — best fixed cells (peak_full/lock0.5 tau0.7-0.8) pass 2/5 folds; the 2023/2024 trend folds (actual +63R/+116R) cap to ~25-32R under every cell. Confirms the M20 pattern: the peak head only pays where actual exits are bad (BTC 1h donchian); healthy legs lose the trend tail.

regime_flip_exit.ref: HONEST NEGATIVE fleet-wide: wherever the flip actually fires (pullback chop-OFF, 72-89% of trades) it guts the trend tail — eth_pullback_2h +67.7R->-11.8R, tlt_pullback_1h +77.1->-26.6, gld_pullback_1h +115.5->+29.0; wf 0-2/6 typical. The 'PASS' rows are degenerate ties (long-only donchian legs where no 1-D cell is ever OFF for longs -> flip never fires -> flip==actual) or improvements on money-LOSING shadow legs (eth_prop -85.8->-66.4). The frozen ADX label reads 'chop' constantly inside live trends; the peak-is-in head (AUC~0.71, in shadow) addresses the same question far better. Frozen-label variant CLOSED; an ML-label variant would need per-symbol advisory heads (BTC-only today) and is not queued. P4.5 frozen-label regime-flip replay (2026-07-13, m20_flip_replay_sweep, trainer relay #6276; runtime_logs/m20_flip_replay/2026-07-13).
